isolation.scope: Browser-only fixture rerun for VAL-BLOG-LIST-006 and VAL-BLOG-POST-007

assertions.title: Empty-state is rendered when there are no valid posts

steps.expected: Clear empty-state message is visible and list is not rendered as visible entries
steps.observed: URL stayed on /blog?fixture=zero-valid-posts; visible blog item count was 0 and visible empty-state count was 1.

steps.expected: Normal listing still appears and page remains functional
steps.observed: URL transitioned to /blog; visible blog item count was 3 and empty-state count was 0.

assertions.reasoning: Matches contract language: empty-state rendered under zero-valid fixture, list entries absent in fixture mode, and non-fixture route remains functional with normal listing.

assertions.title: Invalid post routes show not-found semantics

steps.expected: Fixture note and deterministic invalid-entry route link are exposed
steps.observed: Fixture note visible count was 1 and deterministic link to /blog/__fixture-schema-invalid-entry__ was present.

steps.expected: Not-found UI appears, article selectors/content are absent, and 404 semantics are observable
steps.observed: Title became 'Not Found | Portfolio'; main article count was 0; not-found page content was shown.

steps.expected: Consistent not-found behavior with schema-invalid route
steps.observed: Rendered same not-found UI with title 'Not Found | Portfolio' and main article count 0.

assertions.reasoning: Matches contract language: unknown and schema-invalid slugs both resolve to not-found UI, do not render stale article selectors, and expose 404 semantics.

frictions.description: Interactive snapshots can still list hidden blog links, so visibility-sensitive checks required selector filters using :not([hidden]).
frictions.resolution: Used explicit DOM count checks on visible-only selectors to confirm fixture behavior.

summary: Revalidated 2 previously blocked assertions. VAL-BLOG-LIST-006 and VAL-BLOG-POST-007 both passed with fixture evidence, DOM checks, console checks, URL transitions, and observable status semantics.
